enumDescriptions: Store cache in VSCode global storage, shared across all workspaces (recommended)
Store cache under <workspaceFolder>/.wow-cache (per-project — add to .gitignore)
Store cache at the path given by scryer.cacheDir
scryer.cacheLocation.description: Where Scryer stores its unified cache (source assets + derived conversions)

scryer.cacheDir.description: Cache root when scryer.cacheLocation is "custom". Ignored otherwise. Contains source/ and derived/ subdirectories.

scryer.installDir.description: Path to your World of Warcraft root directory — the folder containing _retail_/, _classic_/, and .build.info (e.g. /path/to/World of Warcraft). Used for build-version detection (automatic cache invalidation on game updates) and as a loose-file texture fallback for Classic. The active flavor's subdirectory is derived automatically from scryer.flavor.

scryer.assetServerPath.description: Path to the CASC extraction server binary (e.g. scryer-asset-server). If empty, the bundled binary is used.

scryer.assetServerIdleTimeout.description: Idle timeout in seconds before the asset server self-exits to free memory.

scryer.tactKeysUrls.description: URLs to fetch the community TACT key list from, tried in order. The first successful response is used.

scryer.atlasCsvUrls.description: URL templates for downloading atlas CSV data. Use {table} as a placeholder for the table name (e.g. UiTextureAtlas). URLs are tried in order.

enumDescriptions: Ask once the first time a missing file is encountered, then remember your choice.
Always download missing files from Blizzard's CDN without prompting.
Never download from CDN. Missing files show as placeholders.
scryer.cdnFallback.description: What to do when a game file is present in your WoW installation's index but hasn't been downloaded by Battle.net. Only applies to Battle.net installs (Steam installs have no CDN coordinates).

scryer.defaultTarget.description: Default WoW version target when no workspace target is configured

scryer.flavor.description: WoW flavor for on-demand texture extraction (retail | classic | classic_era)

scryer.locale.description: WoW locale returned by GetLocale(). Affects addon code that branches on region.

scryer.defaultCanvasMode.description: Default interaction mode for the canvas. 'interact' passes clicks to elements, 'grab' allows panning by dragging anywhere.

scryer.screenResolution.description: Physical monitor resolution for the preview. Determines UIParent dimensions via the WoW aspect-ratio formula.

enumDescriptions: Nothing preloaded at startup
Blizzard shared templates + fonts; ~5 MB
All Blizzard addon templates; ~41 MB
All templates + decodes shared BLPs to PNG cache (SharedXMLBase, SharedXML, FrameXML); ~2.4 MB, ~15s cold
All templates + full Blizzard texture tree; ~452 MB, ~40s
scryer.startupContent.description: What Blizzard template and asset content Scryer loads when the extension activates

enumDescriptions: Resolve and decode textures only when the webview requests them
Pre-warm textures in the currently saved file; tiny <2ms each, large <4s each
Same as saved-file but reads unsaved buffer contents; updates live as you type
Pre-warm textures for all WoW XML files in the workspace; tiny <2ms each, large <4s each
scryer.userAddonPreload.description: How eagerly Scryer pre-warms texture assets for the addon currently being previewed

scryer.imageConvertPath.description: Path to gm (GraphicsMagick) or convert (ImageMagick) for PNG→TGA conversion during workspace SVG pre-warm. Auto-detected from PATH when empty.

scryer.rsvgConvertPath.description: Path to the rsvg-convert binary used to convert SVG addon textures to PNG during workspace pre-warm. Auto-detected from PATH when empty (install librsvg2-bin on Linux/macOS).

scryer.grepPath.description: Path to the grep binary used to filter CASC listfiles during extraction. Auto-detected from PATH when empty. On Linux and macOS grep is typically available by default; on Windows install via Git for Windows, MSYS2, or similar and either add to PATH or set this.

scryer.flavorConfigPath.description: Path to a JSON file that overrides per-flavor display defaults (fonts, viewport size, scale). Must match the shape of src/flavors/defaults.json. Merged additively on top of the built-in config — later layers win per key.

scryer.showRuler.description: Show a pixel ruler overlay along the top and left edges of the Scryer preview panel. Coordinates are in WoW logical pixels. Toggle with Scryer: Toggle Pixel Ruler or the status bar button.

enumDescriptions: Auto checkerboard pattern based on VS Code theme (default)
Dark checkerboard pattern for transparency
Light checkerboard pattern for transparency
Solid black
Solid white
Neutral gray (50%) for color-neutral assessment
Solid magenta for debugging bounds and transparency
Custom image (see scryer.workareaBackgroundPath)
scryer.workareaBackground.description: Background color/pattern of the preview workarea behind the canvas.

scryer.workareaBackgroundPath.description: Path to a custom background image. If a directory is specified, Scryer will look for a <resolution>.png file within it matching the current screen resolution.

scripts.test:ts: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:webview && pnpm run test:xml && pnpm run test:toc
scripts.test:ts:all: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:casc && pnpm run test:net && pnpm run test:webview && pnpm run test:xml && pnpm run test:xml-casc && pnpm run test:toc && pnpm run test:toc-casc
scripts.test: pnpm run test:ts && pnpm run test:rs
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:ts:all && pnpm run test:rs:all
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.gen-api-stubs: node dev/bench.build.mjs && node dist/gen-api-stubs.js && pnpm run lint:fix
